name: Redis: Advanced Data Structures & Patterns
description: Redis beyond simple key-value storage. Using Sorted Sets for leaderboards and time-series data, Streams for event sourcing and message queues (Redis Streams as a lightweight Kafka alternative), implementing distributed locks with Redlock algorithm, pub/sub messaging, Redis Search (RediSearch) for full-text search, and HyperLogLog for probabilistic unique visitor counting at scale.
